creator: sf@slappy.org
text:
Mark as BROKEN

Fix: -*- screamer patch begins here -*-


--------------030307070103070001080306----K1rJIm98LazrZBjqZWX7g26OBHN4EpWGD7qZGXZk9IEUs10C
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ruN screamer.orig/Makefile screamer/Makefile
--- screamer.orig/Makefile	2007-10-25 17:52:12.000000000 -0700
+++ screamer/Makefile	2007-11-08 15:37:34.000000000 -0800
@@ -38,8 +38,6 @@
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
-.if ${ARCH} == "amd64"
-BROKEN=		Does not compile with GCC 4.2
-.endif
+BROKEN=		Does not compile
 
 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>
-*- screamer patch ends here -*-
